title: Combatlog V1
body:
Hi everyone, this is my new Combatlog plugin. 

**Tutorial**
If a player is hit by another player he is in combat log mode for 10 seconds and if he leaves before the time is up he is automatically killed.

**support**
Support is Always 
open. Go to our Discord server and write to the server owner.

**Why do you download?**
Because every Minecraft server needs it and because this plugin geyser is built in.

**Commands for OP's**
/combatlog:reload {reload the plugin} (OP's
